history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05 column F, two cells ahead and one cell to the right of my location. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell. I will move forward to advance towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal (G) is visible two cells ahead and one cell to the right of my current position. The cell directly in front of me is floor (.), so it is safe to move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible at row 07 column F, which is two cells to the right of my current position (represented by ^ at D07). The path ahead seems clear since there are floor cells '.' between me and the goal cell. I am currently facing forward and have a clear path to move forward into the cell at D07. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 07 column F, to the right of my current position. The cell immediately in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal, I should turn right to face the open floor cells towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I see the goal (G) at position D5, which is two cells ahead of me, but directly in front of me is a wall (#). I cannot move forward. To reach the goal, I need to go around the wall. I will turn left to face west and explore the safe cells to my left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 07 column F, two cells to the right of my current position. The cells directly in front and to the right of me appear to be clear (floor or goal). To approach the goal, I should turn right to face it and prepare to move forward towards the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is located at row 05, column D, which is two cells ahead in the direction I am facing. However, the immediate cell in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal, I need to turn left to face open space and eventually navigate around the wall blocking the direct path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is clearly visible at row 07 column F, just to the right of my current position at D7. The path ahead at D7 is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal, I should turn right to face the right direction towards the goal cell at F7.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal (G) is visible at row 05 column D, which is directly two cells ahead of my current position. However, the direct path ahead includes a lava cell at row 05 column E, which is dangerous. I must consider safer movement options. The cell immediately in front (row 06 column D) is floor and safe to move into. I will move forward first to get closer safely to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me two cells away at row 06 column D. However, the cell immediately in front of me (row 07 column D) is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. I notice there is lava (L) to the right and some open floor (.) to the right beyond the lava. I will turn left to explore a potentially open path on my left side.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I see the goal cell at row 07, column E, which is directly to the right of my current position. The cell in front of me is floor, so moving forward is safe. Moving forward takes me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal (G) is visible two cells ahead and one cell to the right in the current row. The cell directly in front of me (D7) is free (.), so I can safely move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me at row 07, column E, just one cell ahead. The cell between me and the goal is floor (safe to move). I will move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 07 column E, directly to my right. The cell in front of me is a floor cell, but moving forward does not bring me closer to the goal. I need to turn to face the right in order to move towards the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I see the goal is at row 06 column D, directly ahead and one row up from my current position. The cell in front of me (at D07) is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal, I need to turn left to face the goal cell directly and then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>
